---
title: ButtonsMobile
subtitle: "keept'em slim"
---

> Buttons from Naked to Bootstrap styling

```{=html}

<!-- this is classless ojs generated -->
      <input 
        type="text"
        name="text" 
        placeholder="mere html input"
      >

<hr/>

<form class="oi-3a86ea-input">
    <input 
        type="text"
        class="px-1 py-1"
        name="text" 
        placeholder="ojs form, classless input"
    >
  </form>

<hr/>

<!--  this is bootstrap styling of input  -->
<input 
  class="form-control px-2 py-1" 
  type="text" 
  placeholder="bootstrap form-control padding" 
  id="inputLarge"
>

<hr/>


```

```{=html}

<div class='d-flex justify-content-evenly' gap-2>

  <input 
    class="form-control px-2 py-1" 
    type="text" 
    placeholder="bootstrap form-control padding" 
    id="inputStd"
  >

  <button class="btn btn-primary  px-2 py-1">Add</button>
  <button class="btn btn-success  px-2 py-1">Clip</button>
  <button class="btn btn-info  px-2 py-1">Help</button>

</div>

<hr/>

```

```{=html}
<div class="container-fluid d-flex flex-column w-100 p-1">
  
  <div class="d-flex align-items-stretch w-100 mb-2 gap-1">
  
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <div class="input-group">
        <span class="input-group-text bg-light d-none d-md-flex">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        </span>
        <input 
          class="form-control px-2 py-1" 
          type="text" 
          placeholder="bootstrap form-control padding" 
          id="inputStd2"
          bind:value={inputValue}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-primary w-100" 
        type="button"
        >
        <span  d-none d-md-flex>
          <i class="bi bi-folder-plus me-1 "></i>
          ADD
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>    

    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-warning w-100" 
        type="button"
        on:click={handleClip}
        disabled={!inputValue}
      >
        <span  d-none d-md-flex>
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard me-1"></i>
          CLIP
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-danger w-100" 
        type="button" 
        on:click={handleRaz}
      >
        <span  d-none d-md-flex>
          <i class="bi bi-eraser me-1"></i>
          RAZ
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

<hr/>

```


```{=html}

<div class="container-fluid d-flex flex-column w-100 p-1">
  
  <div class="d-flex align-items-stretch w-100 mb-2 gap-1">
  
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <div class="input-group">
        <span class="input-group-text bg-light d-none d-md-flex">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        </span>
        <input 
          class="form-control px-2 py-1" 
          type="text" 
          placeholder="bootstrap form-control padding" 
          id="inputStd2"
          bind:value={inputValue}
        />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-primary w-100" 
        type="button"
        >
        <i class="bi bi-folder-plus me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        ADD</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-warning w-100" 
        type="button"
        on:click={handleClip}
        disabled={!inputValue}
      >
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        CLIP
      </button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-0">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-danger w-100" 
        type="button" 
        on:click={handleRaz}
      >
        <i class="bi bi-eraser me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        RAZ
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

```
